message:
fix(tests): resolve external test compilation errors with no-default-features

- Add #![cfg(feature = "subprocess-bridge")] to proptest_beads_bridge.rs
  (beads_bridge/beads_types require subprocess-bridge feature)
- Add #![cfg(feature = "vendored")] to proptest_mux_pool.rs
  (vendored::mux_pool requires vendored feature)
- Fix `let (tx, rx)` → `let (tx, mut rx)` in egress_tap_integration.rs
  (try_recv requires &mut self)
- Split 16-element tuple into nested 8+8 tuples in
  proptest_beta_feedback_loop.rs (proptest supports max 12 per tuple)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
